response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq and Optilyz, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators) that matches a key required skill. Stack alignment is solid (TS, Node, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS CDK) and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) fits the quality bar. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, but the breadth and demonstrated adaptability make this a clear interview.
strengths: Strong recent TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB experience aligned to the primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Deep software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, testing, public talks and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin appears absent and Java is only from older roles (robotic arms era)
Vitest specifically isn't mentioned; testing experience leans on other frameworks
